title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0970
summary: Amjad Rais Redkar was accused of participating in a criminal conspiracy to extort ₹62 lakhs from a businessman, allegedly coordinated by Riyaz Bhati and Salim Fruit, linked to the Dawood gang. The prosecution claimed that the extortion plot was discussed at a party attended by over 200 people and...
